mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) FROM `group` g INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON g.id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.class_id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM textbook t INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON t.id = ctl.textbook_id INNER JOIN course c ON ctl.course_id = c.id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ccl.class_id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ccl.class_id = ucl.class_id WHERE ucl.user_id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2
